parts.text: سَأَلَ عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ:

text: اَللَّيْلَةِ اَلْبَارِدَةِ وَ يَخَافُ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ اَلتَّلَفَ إِنِ اِغْتَسَلَ فَقَالَ «يَتَيَمَّمُ وَ يُصَلِّي فَإِذَا أَمِنَ مِنَ اَلْبَرْدِ اِغْتَسَلَ وَ أَعَادَ اَلصَّلاَةَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.225 - Abdullah ibn Sinan asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a man who becomes junub (ritually impure) during a cold night and fears for his life if he performs ghusl (ritual bathing).
Imam (as) said: 'He should perform tayammum and pray, and when he is safe from the cold, he should perform ghusl and repeat the prayer.'
